positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed abstract geometric forest scene, rendered in a bold linework, nature-meets-sci-fi aesthetic. The central composition features stylized crystalline fauna (e.g., butterflies, deer silhouettes) interweaving with abstract flora (mandala-style leaves, geometric roots). The style must evoke clean, modern graphic novel illustration mixed with Art Deco linework. Use high contrast black and white ink on a solid background. The composition should be perfectly centered and highly scalable, suitable for a repeating pattern or large chest print on apparel. Accent colors should be limited to deep teal and gold ink accents, applied sparingly to geometric edges. Clean silhouettes, maximalist yet balanced.
negative: low quality, blurry, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, words, dirty, messy, cartoon, anime, realistic, photograph, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dull colors
